violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. Broaster was not under a commercial hood vent.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Foam plates by the steam table up front were not inverted.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. The bar hand sink had a box and cup sitting in the hand sink.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. Soap was not available for the hand sink in the bar area.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser for the hand sink by the mop sink was empty.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. Wet mop was being stored in the bottom of the mop sink, and not placed in a position to dry.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not designed and/or maintained properly. A residential hood was being used to vent the broaster/fryer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The gaskets on the prep cooler across from the cooking equipment need to be cleaned.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Black foam hinged containers and foam plates behind the bar were not inverted.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Provided as required, designed, constructed, installed, maintained, and cleaned (1 pt deducted)
